why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound minecraft:animate must dispatch from the official framed packet id to a ClientboundAnimatePacket-compatible decoder through Stevenarella packet_by_id. This is packet-support evidence only and is separate from entity existence, animation semantics, initialized Entity/Level behavior, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
what: The Rust oracle test play_animate_clientbound_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer did not compile because Stevenarella had no Packet::PlayAnimateClientbound variant for the official Play clientbound animate surface. The current v26_1_2.rs Protocol 775 Play clientbound table maps minecraft:bundle_delimiter / 0x00 and minecraft:add_entity / 0x01, but not minecraft:animate / 0x02.

play_clientbound_animate.official_fixture: official ClientboundAnimatePacket.STREAM_CODEC decode fixture with entity id and SWING_MAIN_HAND action; no initialized Entity, Level, or game state
play_clientbound_animate.official_body_shape: entity id VarInt; action unsigned byte

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: ClientboundAnimatePacket.STREAM_CODEC, private ClientboundAnimatePacket(FriendlyByteBuf), private write(FriendlyByteBuf), ClientboundAnimatePacket.SWING_MAIN_HAND, GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.bind(...).codec().encode/decode(...), and ClientGamePacketListener.handleAnimate(ClientboundAnimatePacket).
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Play clientbound animate dispatch.
Current Protocol 775 Play clientbound mapping has official packet ids 0x00 bundle_delimiter and 0x01 add_entity, but not official packet id 0x02 animate.
Current Packet enum has no Play animate packet variant matching the official 26.1.2 body order.

observed_failure: error[E0599]: no variant or associated item named `PlayAnimateClientbound` found for enum `Packet`
